since_last: 74% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.35%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC +1.05% · Gold +1.64% · Nasdaq100 +1.38%. 74% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.35%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.35%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.32%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.32%, SYNA +9.31%, CEVA +7.44%, MU +7.30%, AMD +6.97%. Laggards: AVAV -4.82%, PLTR -3.65%, SOUN -3.31%, GOOGL -2.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.45% at $150.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
